title: Token Pruning and Selection Flow
interaction_flow: LatentRecon.forward(data) → forward_gaussians(images, plucker, rays_os, rays_ds, time_embeddings)
forward_gaussians → patch_embed(images_input) → enc_blocks (transformer) → enc_norm → block_out
forward_gaussians → deconv(x) or decoder_cosmos(x) [upsample latent features]
forward_gaussians: if sub_sample_gaussians_type=='learned' → split x into (x[:, :-1], x_mask=x[:, [-1]])
forward_gaussians → subsample_x_and_rays_wrapper(x, rays_os, rays_ds, x_mask)
subsample_x_and_rays_wrapper → subsample_x_and_rays(x, rays_os, rays_ds, x_mask, factor, type, type_tokens, temperature, training)
subsample_x_and_rays: compute t_g_out, h_g_out, w_g_out = (x.shape[-3:] / sub_sample_gaussians_factor).int()
[branch: sub_sample_gaussians_type=='random'] subsample_x_and_rays → subsample_pixels_spatio_temporal() → query_z_with_indices(bthw_g, x/rays)

[branch: sub_sample_gaussians_type=='learned' & type_tokens=='local'] subsample_x_and_rays → process_tensors(tokens=x, mask_logits=x_mask, other_tensors=[rays_os, rays_ds], k_t=t_g_out, k_hw=h_g_out*w_g_out, temperature, training)

[branch: sub_sample_gaussians_type=='learned' & type_tokens=='global'] subsample_x_and_rays → process_tensors(tokens=x, mask_logits=x_mask, other_tensors=[rays_os, rays_ds], total_k=t_g_out*h_g_out*w_g_out, temperature, training)
process_tensors: squeeze mask_logits (B,1,T,H,W) → (B,T,H,W); if training or soft_inference → method='softmax', hard=True; else → method='topk', hard=False
[branch: total_k is not None] process_tensors → global_selection(mask_logits, total_k, method, temperature, hard, eps)
global_selection: flatten (B,T,H,W) → (B, N=T*H*W) → select_topk(logits_flat, total_k, method, temperature, hard, eps) → reshape back to (B,T,H,W)
[branch: k_t and k_hw are not None] process_tensors → structured_selection(mask_logits, k_t, k_hw, method, temperature, hard, eps)
structured_selection: temporal logits_t = mask_logits.mean(dim=[2,3]) → (B,T) → select_topk(logits_t, k_t, ...)
structured_selection: for each (b,t): logits_hw = mask_logits[b,t].reshape(-1) → select_topk(logits_hw.unsqueeze(0), k_hw, ...) → reshape (H,W)
structured_selection: mask = mask_spatial * mask_t.unsqueeze(-1).unsqueeze(-1) → (B,T,H,W)
select_topk [method='topk']: torch.topk(logits, k) → scatter to binary mask (B,N)

select_topk [method='softmax']: sample_gumbel(shape, eps, device, dtype) → y = (logits + gumbel_noise) / temperature → softmax(y); if hard=True → straight-through: hard_mask - y_soft.detach() + y_soft
process_tensors → apply_mask_and_select(tokens, other_tensors=[rays_os, rays_ds], mask)
apply_mask_and_select: flatten tokens (B,C,T,H,W)→(B,C,N), mask→(B,N); per batch: idx=mask_flat[b].nonzero(); gather tokens[:,idx] and other_tensors at idx → stack → (B,C,k)
process_tensors returns (tokens_out, others_out, mask) → back to subsample_x_and_rays → returns to forward_gaussians
forward_gaussians → gaussian_processing(x, rays_os, rays_ds) → split into distance/rgb/scaling/rotation/opacity → activations → cat gaussians (B,N,14)
forward_gaussians → gaussian_pruning(gaussians): opacity-based top-k + optional random keep
LatentRecon.forward → gs.render(gaussians, cam_view, bg_color, intrinsics) → returns images_pred, depths_pred
key_relationships: process_tensors delegates_to global_selection OR structured_selection (mutually exclusive, based on total_k vs k_t/k_hw)
structured_selection delegates_to select_topk (twice: temporal then spatial per-frame)
select_topk delegates_to sample_gumbel (only in softmax/Gumbel path)
LatentRecon.forward_gaussians produces mask_logit as extra output channel (output_dims += 1 when sub_sample_gaussians_type=='learned')

method_signatures.process_tensors: process_tensors(tokens:(B,C,T,H,W), mask_logits:(B,1,T,H,W), other_tensors:List[Tensor], total_k:Optional[int], k_t:Optional[int], k_hw:Optional[int], temperature:float=1.0, eps:float=1e-6, training:bool=True, soft_inference:bool=True) -> (tokens_out, others_out, mask)
method_signatures.global_selection: global_selection(mask_logits:(B,T,H,W), total_k:int, method:str, temperature:float, hard:bool, eps:float) -> mask:(B,T,H,W)
method_signatures.structured_selection: structured_selection(mask_logits:(B,T,H,W), k_t:int, k_hw:int, method:str, temperature:float, hard:bool, eps:float) -> mask:(B,T,H,W)
method_signatures.select_topk: select_topk(logits:(B,N), k:int, method:str, temperature:float, hard:bool, eps:float) -> mask:(B,N)
method_signatures.subsample_x_and_rays: subsample_x_and_rays(x, rays_os, rays_ds, x_mask, sub_sample_gaussians_factor, sub_sample_gaussians_type, sub_sample_gaussians_type_tokens, temperature, training)
method_signatures.LatentRecon.forward_gaussians: forward_gaussians(images_input, plucker_embedding, rays_os, rays_ds, time_embeddings, num_input_multi_views) -> (gaussians:(B,N,14), x_mask)
method_signatures.LatentRecon.gaussian_pruning: gaussian_pruning(gaussians:(B,N,14)) -> gaussians pruned by opacity top-k + random

branching_logic.training_vs_inference: training=True or soft_inference=True → method='softmax', hard=True (Gumbel-Softmax, differentiable); else → method='topk', hard=False (non-differentiable)
branching_logic.selection_mode: total_k provided → global_selection (joint T×H×W); k_t+k_hw provided → structured_selection (temporal then spatial independently); neither → ValueError
branching_logic.subsampling_type: sub_sample_gaussians_type='random' → random pixel sampling; 'learned' + type_tokens='local' → structured_selection; 'learned' + type_tokens='global' → global_selection
branching_logic.mask_logit_extraction: sub_sample_gaussians_type='learned' → output_dims += 1 (mask logit channel); x_mask = x[:, [-1]]; x = x[:, :-1]

important_notes: Token pruning selects a subset of spatio-temporal Gaussian tokens for efficient rendering. Two modes: (1) structured/local selects k_t temporal frames then k_hw spatial tokens per frame independently (outer product mask); (2) global selects total_k tokens jointly across T×H×W. Gumbel-Softmax straight-through estimator enables differentiable selection during training. gaussian_pruning is a separate opacity-based post-process (Long LRM style). process_tensors is the central entry point imported from token_pruning.py into render.py.
